<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This is a Flutter project for "TravelMate", a Smart Travel Itinerary Planner & Expense Splitter.
It uses Hive for local storage, Provider for state management, and fl_chart for visualizations.
All amount displays should use `GoogleFonts.jetBrainsMono()`.
Follow the dark theme design system defined in `lib/utils/app_theme.dart`.
Ensure consistency in using the `TripCard` and `GradientCard` components.
